title: Marsea gnaphalioides
intro: Marsea gnaphalioides, also known as Marsea, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in relieving various health conditions such as digestive issues and skin irritations. The bioactive constituents of Marsea gnaphalioides include sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, as well as other compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. Traditionally, Marsea is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and promote immune system function.
